LANGUAGE.description:
🌍 Choose your bot language
🇬🇧 en - English
🇿🇼 sn - Shona
🇿🇼 nd - Ndebele
🇿🇦 af - Afrikaans
🇿🇦 zu - Zulu
🇿🇦 xh - Xhosa
🇵🇹 pt - Portuguese
🇰🇪 sw - Swahili
🇮🇳 hi - Hindi
🇮🇶 ar - Arabic
🇫🇷 fr - French
🇪🇸 es - Spanish
🇨🇳 zh - Chinese
🇩🇪 de - German
🇯🇵 ja - Japanese
🇰🇷 ko - Korean
🇷🇺 ru - Russian
🇮🇹 it - Italian

AUTO_READ_STATUS.description: ♻️ Your contact status will be read automatically

AUTO_DOWNLOAD_STATUS.description: 🟢 Your contact status will be download automatically

AUTOREACT_STATUS.description: 🎊 Enter yes for your bot to auto like status

BOT_NAME.description: 👤 Put a name for your bot

BOT_MENU_LINKS.description: 🖼️ Add one or many link for your bot menu

PUBLIC_MODE.description: 🌐 Type yes to put your bot on public mode or no to put it on private mode

SESSION_ID.description: 📃 Put your session ID, the code you received after pairing code

NUMERO_OWNER.desc: 🍥 Your number, don't put '+' and put your area code

WARN_COUNT.desc: 🚫 This is the limit of warn for warning commandes

STARTING_BOT_MESSAGE.description: 💬 If you don't want starting bot message put no else put yes

PRESENCE.description: ⬇️ Mark your presence: 1 for online, 2 for typing, 3 for recording

ANTI_DELETE_MESSAGE.description: 🚮 If you want to enable anti delete message put yes else put no
